ItacAcademyItem.Name: Occulti-Murano (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Publications related to this Academy, but not in British Library collections, include: Prataleae Delitiae Obscuri in Academia nobilium Occultorum Venetiis, ad praeclariss. ac sapientiss. Alexandrum Contarenum q. imperialis venetiis, de Albertis, 1608; Hyeronimi Lauredani filii q. Petri e clarissima Nobilium Occultorum Academia Sylva panegirica ad ill. Petrum Priolum equitem e gallica legatione redeuntem (Venetiis Junta, 1608).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
